name: Baked Chicken Salad (Oster Kitchen Center Cookbook)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Place chicken and celery in the casserole dish.
4. Process nuts (almonds) until finely chopped, then add to chicken.
5. Empty 2 cups of potato chips onto wax paper and set aside.
6. Repeat with remaining potato chips.
7. Blend remaining ingredients until smooth and mix into the chicken.
8. Sprinkle potato chip crumbs over top.
9. Bake for 30 minutes.
